description_long: This is a generously filled sandwich served on a decorative white plate with blue floral patterns. The sandwich is made with a folded, ridged flatbread that is lightly toasted and golden brown. Inside, the filling consists of layers of sliced beef or lamb, fresh lettuce, tomato slices, and visible rings of red onion, all packed tightly together. The sandwich appears juicy and fresh, with the vegetables adding vibrant color and texture contrast to the meat. The bread is thick and slightly puffy, providing a sturdy shell for the hearty filling. No packaging or branding is visible, and the sandwich is presented as if ready to eat.
description: A thick, ridged flatbread sandwich filled with sliced meat, lettuce, tomato, and red onion, served on a decorative blue-and-white plate. The sandwich looks fresh, juicy, and generously packed.
description_view_0: The sandwich is shown with its filling partially visible, highlighting the layers of meat, lettuce, and tomato inside the folded flatbread.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the open side of the sandwich, revealing a colorful mix of sliced meat, tomatoes, and red onions spilling out.
description_view_2: The sandwich is angled to show more of the filling, with the red onions and tomatoes especially prominent against the bread.
description_view_3: The sandwich is viewed from the back, showing mostly the textured, ridged surface of the flatbread with little filling visible.
